mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (document_id, chunk_index, content, character_count, metadata, embedding) VALUES
(#{row.documentId}, #{row.chunkIndex}, #{row.content}, #{row.characterCount}, CAST(#{row.metadataJson} AS JSONB), CAST(#{row.embeddingLiteral} AS VECTOR))
mapper.select: SELECT kc.id AS chunk_id, kc.document_id, kd.title AS document_title, kc.content, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY kc.embedding <=> CAST(#{embeddingLiteral} AS VECTOR), kc.id) AS rank, 1 - (kc.embedding <=> CAST(#{embeddingLiteral} AS VECTOR)) AS raw_score FROM knowledge_chunk kc JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kd.id = kc.document_id AND kd.status = 'READY' WHERE kc.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY kc.embedding <=> CAST(#{embeddingLiteral} AS VECTOR), kc.id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT scored.chunk_id, scored.document_id, scored.document_title, scored.content, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY scored.keyword_score DESC, scored.chunk_id) AS rank, scored.keyword_score AS raw_score FROM ( SELECT kc.id AS chunk_id, kc.document_id, kd.title AS document_title, kc.content, (CASE WHEN POSITION(LOWER(#{query}) IN LOWER(kc.content)) > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END + similarity(kc.content, #{query}) + ts_rank(kc.search_vector, plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}))) AS keyword_score FROM knowledge_chunk kc JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kd.id = kc.document_id AND kd.status = 'READY' WHERE POSITION(LOWER(#{query}) IN LOWER(kc.content)) > 0 OR kc.search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}) OR similarity(kc.content, #{query}) > 0.05 ) scored ORDER BY scored.keyword_score DESC, scored.chunk_id LIMIT #{limit}
